note: Tier-1 ERP pill manifest for erp.html. fn/isActive are bound BY ID in code at mount (functions are not JSON). icon: '@bim' = adopt the icon the BIM registry already binds for that id (reuse, not reinvent); a bare name = a glyph that EXISTS in the panels.js I.<name> set; 'NEEDS-ICON:<hint>' = a glyph the set lacks, to be ADDED + reviewed, never inlined as raw SVG (PILL_MANIFEST_SPEC §0.3).

pills.name: Report
pills.note: ERP financial Report (Receipt/Trial Balance/P&L). DISTINCT id — NOT BIM report=4D/5D.

pills.name: Editable
pills.note: placeholder glyph (closest existing) — a 'pencil' glyph TBD

pills.name: iDempiere-like UI
pills.note: ETHICS: the user's neutral A+ raster (aplus.png) — supersedes erp_mark.svg; NEVER the trademarked iDempiere logo (prompts/IDEMPIERE_PILL_HANDOFF.md, docs/IDEMPIERE_2.md §Guardrails 3). Renderer #1 = idempiere.html, built idempiereUI.md I1.

pills.name: Gravity
